functionEntry.name: hasExternalSpeed
functionEntry.documentation:
True when the device reports a real (ANT+ or BLE-central) wheel sensor
is feeding speed — i.e. we should NOT write our head-unit speed back.

functionEntry.name: parse
functionEntry.documentation: Parse a notify payload. Returns true if any known layout matched.

functionEntry.name: writeSpeedMps
functionEntry.documentation: Write speed_mps as little-endian uint16 cm/s to characteristic 53f3c0b4.

functionEntry.name: queuePressureCalRequest
functionEntry.documentation:
Request a static pressure calibration. Firmware enforces stationary +
settled-pressure preconditions.

functionEntry.name: queueMassKg
functionEntry.documentation:
Write the rider+bike+gear mass to the Settings characteristic as TLV
{ type=0x01, len=2, value=uint16 LE kg*10 }.

functionEntry.name: <globals/AerosenseField/<>_drawGrid>
functionEntry.documentation:
2-row × 2-column aero grid below the header. Appends a 4-cell native
metrics row when the available vertical space meets the threshold.

functionEntry.name: <globals/AerosenseField/<>_maybeDrawDebugHud>
functionEntry.documentation:
Temporary diagnostic overlay (gated by the debug_hud app property).
On hardware System.println is not accessible, so this surfaces the BLE
subscription/notify internals directly on screen. Reads, left to right:
C connected (telemetry characteristic discovered)
cd CCCD descriptor found on the telemetry characteristic
dw last CCCD descriptor-write status (BluetoothLowEnergy.Status, 0=ok)
nf count of telemetry notifications received (climbs => notifies flow)
ok last notification parsed successfully
ln byte length of the last notification payload

functionEntry.name: <globals/AerosenseField/<>_drawHeader>
functionEntry.documentation:
Slim top strip: status dot left, battery % right, state chips + wordmark
in the middle (wordmark dropped when space is tight).
Returns the strip's height in px so the grid knows where to start.

functionEntry.name: <globals/AerosenseField/<>_drawStatusMessage>
functionEntry.documentation:
Centered status message in the area below the header. Optional hint
line is drawn beneath in a smaller dim font.

functionEntry.name: getSensorDelegate
functionEntry.documentation:
Native Connect IQ sensor-pairing entry point. This is separate from the
foreground data-field BLE delegate because Garmin may instantiate it in
the system pairing UI without running the data field view.

functionEntry.name: onSettingsChanged
functionEntry.documentation:
Forward settings sync to the data field and push app settings over BLE
when connected.
